title: Verify that the 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch is functional
test_steps: Navigate to the 'T-Mobile Tuesdays' settings screen. | Click on the 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch. | Verify that the toggle switch changes state between 'ON' and 'OFF'.
expected_result: The 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch should toggle between 'ON' and 'OFF' states.

title: Verify that the 'SOUND' toggle switch is functional
test_steps: Navigate to the 'T-Mobile Tuesdays' settings screen. | Click on the 'SOUND' toggle switch. | Verify that the toggle switch changes state between 'ON' and 'OFF'.
expected_result: The 'SOUND' toggle switch should toggle between 'ON' and 'OFF' states.

title: Verify that the 'LOGIN' button is functional
test_steps: Navigate to the 'T-Mobile Tuesdays' settings screen. | Click on the 'LOGIN' button. | Verify that the user is redirected to the login page.
expected_result: The 'LOGIN' button should redirect the user to the login page.

title: Verify that the 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch is set to 'OFF' by default
test_steps: Navigate to the 'T-Mobile Tuesdays' settings screen. | Verify that the 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch is set to 'OFF'.
expected_result: The 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch should be set to 'OFF' by default.

title: Verify that the 'SOUND' toggle switch is set to 'OFF' by default
test_steps: Navigate to the 'T-Mobile Tuesdays' settings screen. | Verify that the 'SOUND' toggle switch is set to 'OFF'.
expected_result: The 'SOUND' toggle switch should be set to 'OFF' by default.

title: Verify that the 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch is not clickable when set to 'OFF'
test_steps: Navigate to the 'T-Mobile Tuesdays' settings screen. | Verify that the 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch is set to 'OFF'. | Attempt to click on the 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch. | Verify that the toggle switch is not clickable when set to 'OFF'.
expected_result: The 'PUSH NOTIFICATIONS' toggle switch should not be clickable when set to 'OFF'.

title: Verify that the 'SOUND' toggle switch is not clickable when set to 'OFF'
test_steps: Navigate to the 'T-Mobile Tuesdays' settings screen. | Verify that the 'SOUND' toggle switch is set to 'OFF'. | Attempt to click on the 'SOUND' toggle switch. | Verify that the toggle switch is not clickable when set to 'OFF'.
expected_result: The 'SOUND' toggle switch should not be clickable when set to 'OFF'.
